visual_summary: A rotating circular progress bar animation that displays a value up to 100. This component is used when a developer wants to visually represent progress towards a goal, and add a sense of dynamism to a dashboard or metrics view.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready loader component with the following characteristics:

Name: Animated Circular Progress Bar Demo
Description: A rotating circular progress bar animation that displays a value up to 100. This component is used when a developer wants to visually represent progress towards a goal, and add a sense of dynamism to a dashboard or metrics view.
Style: animated, glassmorphism
Interactions: rotating, updateable
Tags: progress, animation, circular, bar

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
